verse_text: And he found a certain Jew named Aquila, born in Pontus, who had recently come from Italy with his wife Priscilla (because Claudius had commanded all the Jews to depart from Rome); and he came to them.

links.context: Aquila and Priscilla were Jews who had been among those expelled from Rome by Claudius in AD 49-50. They had resided in Corinth for a while ([[ACT.18:2]]) and then moved to Ephesus ([[ACT.18:26]]).
